### Postdocs

::: {.grid}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Ethan Epperly"
    url    = "https://ethanepperly.com"
    image  = "/images/ethan-epperly.jpeg"
    affil  = "Miller Research Fellow, Hosted by Lin Lin"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Simon Gabriel"
    url    = "https://gabriel-maths.github.io"
    image  = "/images/simon-gabriel.jpg"
    affil  = "Charles B. Morrey Math Fellow, Hosted by Fraydoun Rezakhanlou"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Zoe Himwich"
    url    = "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=SvDf-MwAAAAJ&hl=en"
    image  = "/images/zoe-himwich.jpeg"
    affil  = "NSF Postdoc, Hosted by Shirshendu Ganguly"
>}}


{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Arash Jamshidpey"
    url    = "https://sites.google.com/view/arash-jamshidpey"
    image  = "/images/Arash-Jamshidpey.jpg"
    affil  = "Neyamn Assistant Professor"
>}}
:::
